title: meconopsis horridula var. typica
intro: Meconopsis horridula var. typica is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae, commonly known as the Himalayan blue poppy. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Meconopsis horridula var. typica are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for various herbal remedies.
